title: please just login!
description: A fork of OpeNLogin with more features
body:
# Please Just Login

Froked from [OpeNLogin](https://github.com/nickuc/OpeNLogin).  
In goal of adding more features 

pssss... you can easily move from loginsecurity to plsjustlogin (scroll down to admin cmds for more info)

## Use of genrative ai ⚠️
Generative AI has been used in the development of **this fork** to assist with implementing and refining new features. **PLEASE USE THIS PLUGIN FOR SMP/PRIVATE USE THIS PLUGIN IS NOT SUITABLE FOR PROD**

### Features:
* Login from Spawn and telport to last location (WITH LESS FAILURE RATES!)
![Preview](https://i.postimg.cc/sXmWc3yk/lastloc.gif)  
<small> So dont worry about your players randomly teleporting into spawn after login
</small>  

* Hide inventory when on login with [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)

* Migrate from Login security to Plsjustlogin (look at the admin commands on how to do so)
* Captcha system  
* Players dont heal in login screen!  
* Players are hidden in login screen!  
![Preview](https://i.postimg.cc/Z5Zh4wr8/Video-Project.gif)

**Admin commands** 
```
/plsjustadmin rmpass <Username> #Removes Passwword for that user (acts like Unregister)
/plsjustadmin migrate <OldUsername> <NewUsername> # Migrates from old username to new username (Untested Use it at your on risk)
/plsjustadmin changepass <Username> <New Password> #Changes Password
/plsjustadmin import LoginSecurity # Migrate from LoginSecurity to Plsjstlogin (Make sure to delete LoginSecurity jar file(s) and Only keep the folder then only run this command)
```
